text:
Hodge is a student appearing in Attack on Playtime, the seventh short story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Hodge has pink hair tied in two pigtails. She wears a white bandana and her school uniform which consists in a blue top with a matching skirt, white socks and shoes.

Personality

Hodge is a cruel and childlish individual who asks her Titan friend to kill all the adults in her school who grounded her.

Story

While in literature class, Hodge does not pay attention, busy making a list. Her teacher, Mr. Pikeoil, notices it and yells at her. He asks her if she is ready for show and tell. She says she is and calls Petunia, her Titan friend, happily stating she is her show and tell. Petunia devours Mr. Locksnipe and Hodge crosses his name off her list.

Hodge and Petunia go find the gym teacher Mrs. Locksnipe. Sitting on the Titan's shoulder, Hodge watches Petunia eating the teacher's lower half and sarcastically states she has lost some weight. Smiling, Hodge quotes her teacher.

Hodge goes and eats at the cafeteria, still on Petunia's shoulder. Principal Razorbait shows up, angry, and demands Petunia to get out of the school, calling her hideous. This angers Hodge and she hits him before ordering Petunia to eat him. She asks the Titan to show to the students the principal's chewed corpse and finishes her list. The students then go outside to play with Petunia, after they find her a uniform.

People killed

Indirectly

Pikeoil
Locksnipe[[Hodge#cite%20note-aa7p6%20-%207-2| [2] ]]
Razorbait[[Hodge#cite%20note-aa7p8%20-%2012-3| [3] ]]
